name: jeremyknows--x-bookmark-triage
description: Automatically triages X/Twitter bookmarks into structured knowledge cards and posts them to a Discord channel (#knowledge-intake or similar). Captures tweet content via fxtwitter, scores relevance using Claude Haiku, assigns tier (1–10), freshness (evergreen/dated/expired), and topic tags, then optionally unbookmarks after capture. Includes a scheduled poll for new bookmarks, a one-time backlog sweep, and a manual drop handler. Use when: (1) setting up automated bookmark → knowledge card pipeline, (2) draining an existing bookmark backlog, (3) dropping a URL manually for immediate triage, (4) packaging this as a publishable skill for other OpenClaw users. Requires X OAuth 2.0 User Context with bookmark.read scope (+ bookmark.write to unbookmark). Triggers on: "triage my bookmarks", "set up bookmark pipeline", "drain bookmark backlog", "x-bookmark-triage", "knowledge intake".
